page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9a.xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 4 dedicated physical cores and 4 vCPUs, utilizing a single thread per core configuration. The instance is equipped with an AMD EPYC 9T25 processor running at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz, paired with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local NVMe or SSD storage, requiring network-attached storage for persistent data. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps and does not bundle any complimentary public IPv4 addresses. There are no hardware accelerators or GPUs present on this instance type.

With a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.r9a.xlarge offers a high-density memory configuration relative to its compute resources. This profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-bound workloads that do not require high-performance local storage or massive parallel compute. It is suitable for hosting small-to-medium relational databases, in-memory caching layers, enterprise applications, and lightweight data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9a.xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor and powered by an AMD EPYC 9T25 processor. Operating on the x86_64 architecture, it features 4 dedicated vCPUs across 4 physical cores with a single thread per core, running at 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 32.0 GB of RAM, establishing a 1:8 vCPU-to-memory ratio. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. This resource profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads that require dedicated CPU allocation without the overhead of simultaneous multithreading. It is well-suited for hosting in-memory databases, caching systems, and enterprise applications that demand a high memory-to-core ratio.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9a.xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 4 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 4 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for in-memory databases and caching.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC cores and a high memory-to-CPU ratio for memory-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 2.7 GHz AMD EPYC 9T25 processor
4 dedicated vCPUs with a single thread per core
32.0 GB of RAM providing a 1:8 vCPU-to-memory ratio
No local storage or bundled GPUs included
Designed for in-memory databases, caching, and enterprise applications
